segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a cozy, wood-paneled room illuminated by warm lamplight. A wooden piano sits against the left wall while a red velvet armchair rests on a patterned rug in the center. The camera slowly pans right, revealing more of the room's antique furnishings and the curtained window at the far end.

segments.scene_description: As the pan continues rightward, the piano exits the frame to the left while a wooden side table and cabinet come into view on the right. The red armchair and floor lamp shift toward the left edge of the frame, and the patterned rug extends toward the foreground. The warm lighting maintains the intimate, mysterious atmosphere throughout the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow rightward pan across a dimly lit, wood-paneled room that shifts from a focus on musical instruments to a collection of antique cabinetry. It begins with a view of a wooden piano against the left wall and a red velvet armchair resting on a patterned rug under warm lamplight. As the camera continues its steady movement, the piano exits the frame to the left, allowing the red armchair and floor lamp to shift toward the edge of the view. The scene then expands to reveal a wooden side table and cabinet appearing on the right, while the patterned rug extends further into the foreground. This continuous motion maintains an intimate and mysterious atmosphere as the camera glides toward the curtained window at the far end of the room.
